report.title: EBMS Countries And Other TTL Attribute Profiles For App Test
report.description: Return EBMS country and taxon list profiles for app - Test version
report.query:
WITH region_lists AS ( SELECT id, title, replace(title, 'EBMS Country List - ', '') as location_code, description FROM scratchpad_lists WHERE title ILIKE 'EBMS Country List - %' AND deleted=false AND website_id=118 ) -- First, get data from taxon_lists appropriate to EBMS. SELECT tl.id, 'list' as type, null as location_code, tl.title as name, tl.description as description, null as coordinates, count(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) as taxa_count, '[' || string_agg(distinct cttl.taxon_group_id::text, ', ') || ']' as species_groups, max(cttl.cache_updated_on) as updated_on, null as dist, null AS locations, null AS projects FROM taxon_lists tl LEFT JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl on cttl.taxon_list_id = tl.id AND cttl.allow_data_entry = true WHERE tl.id in (251,260,261,265) AND ('#location_code_filter#' = '') AND (tl.title ILIKE '%' || '#name_filter#' || '%' OR '#name_filter#' = '') AND (cttl.taxon_group_id in (#species_groups_filter#) OR '#species_groups_filter#' = '0') AND (cttl.cache_updated_on >= '#updated_on_filter#'::timestamp) GROUP BY tl.id, tl.title, tl.description
UNION
-- Now fetch the scratchpad lists for region lists. SELECT rl.id, 'location' as type, rl.location_code, rl.title as name, rl.description, ARRAY[ ROUND(ST_Y(ST_Transform(l.centroid_geom, 4326))::numeric, 5), ROUND(ST_X(ST_Transform(l.centroid_geom, 4326))::numeric, 5) ] AS coordinates, COUNT(DISTINCT cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS taxa_count, '[' || STRING_AGG(DISTINCT cttl.taxon_group_id::text, ', ') || ']' AS species_groups, GREATEST(MAX(cttl.cache_updated_on), MAX(sle.updated_on)) AS updated_on, CASE WHEN '#lon#' = '1000' OR '#lat#' = '1000' THEN null ELSE ST_Distance( ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#lon#, #lat#), 4326), ST_Transform(COALESCE(l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom),4326) ) END AS dist, null AS locations, null AS projects FROM region_lists rl LEFT JOIN locations l on (l.code = rl.location_code OR (l.code='UK' AND rl.location_code='GB') OR (l.code='SH' AND rl.location_code='SH: HL') OR (l.code='EL' AND rl.location_code='GR') OR (l.code='PT3' AND rl.location_code='PT: MA')) AND l.deleted = false and l.location_type_id in (16516, 16517) LEFT JOIN scratchpad_list_entries sle ON sle.scratchpad_list_id = rl.id AND sle.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=sle.entry_id AND cttl.allow_data_entry=true WHERE (rl.title ILIKE '%' || '#name_filter#' || '%' OR '#name_filter#' = '') AND (cttl.taxon_group_id in (#species_groups_filter#) OR '#species_groups_filter#' = '0') AND GREATEST(cttl.cache_updated_on, sle.updated_on) >= '#updated_on_filter#'::timestamp AND (rl.location_code = '#location_code_filter#' OR '#location_code_filter#' = '') GROUP BY rl.id, rl.location_code, rl.title, rl.description, l.centroid_sref, l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom
UNION
SELECT sl.id, 'custom_list' AS type, null AS location_code, sl.title AS name, sl.description AS description, null AS coordinates, COUNT(DISTINCT cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS taxa_count, '[' || STRING_AGG(DISTINCT cttl.taxon_group_id::text, ', ') || ']' AS species_groups, GREATEST(MAX(cttl.cache_updated_on), MAX(sle.updated_on)) AS updated_on, MIN(CASE WHEN '#lon#' = '1000' OR '#lat#' = '1000' THEN null ELSE ST_Distance( ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#lon#, #lat#), 4326), ST_Transform(COALESCE(l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom),4326) ) END) AS dist, '[' || STRING_AGG(DISTINCT l.id::text, ', ') || ']' AS locations, '[' || STRING_AGG(DISTINCT g.id::text, ', ') || ']' AS projects
FROM scratchpad_lists sl LEFT JOIN locations_scratchpad_lists lsl on lsl.scratchpad_list_id = sl.id AND lsl.deleted=false LEFT JOIN locations l on l.id = lsl.location_id AND l.deleted=false LEFT JOIN groups_scratchpad_lists gsl on gsl.scratchpad_list_id = sl.id AND gsl.deleted=false LEFT JOIN groups g on g.id = gsl.group_id AND g.deleted=false LEFT JOIN scratchpad_list_entries sle ON sle.scratchpad_list_id = sl.id AND sle.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=sle.entry_id AND cttl.allow_data_entry=true WHERE sl.website_id=118 AND sl.deleted=false AND sl.scratchpad_type_id=22150 AND (l.id IS NOT NULL OR g.id IS NOT NULL) AND (sl.title ILIKE '%' || '#name_filter#' || '%' OR '#name_filter#' = '') AND (cttl.taxon_group_id in (#species_groups_filter#) OR '#species_groups_filter#' = '0') AND GREATEST(cttl.cache_updated_on, sle.updated_on) >= '#updated_on_filter#'::timestamp GROUP BY sl.id, sl.title, sl.description, l.centroid_sref, l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom
ORDER BY dist, type, name

param.name: species_groups_filter
param.description: Taxon groups filter. Accepts a comma separated list.

param.name: updated_on_filter
param.description: Return rows which are on or later than this date (format YYYY-MM-DD).
